rationale: Educ. Code §25.0011 governs residency of incarcerated children in private juvenile detention facilities for school admission purposes. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or appraised value under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: For purposes of Section 25.001, a person is not considered to reside in a school district if:
_note: No conflict. The rule addresses school district residency for incarcerated children and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
